pwcli
Test App
  • Dashboard
  • Forms
  • Interactions
  • Modals
  • Dynamic
  • Multi-Tab
  • Network
pwcli-test-app v0.1.0
|

Scroll & Anchor Test

0%

Contents

This page tests scroll detection, anchor navigation, and progress tracking. Use pw scroll commands and verify position with pw screenshot.

#1Section 1

This is a test section for pwcli scroll automation scenarios. Each section contains enough content to require scrolling. Playwright agents can detect this section by its stable data-testid attribute and verify scroll position. Use pw snapshot or pw screenshot to confirm the viewport position before and after scroll actions. This section has additional content to vary height and simulate real-world document layouts. Scroll verification is a core agent capability.

#2Section 2

This is a test section for pwcli scroll automation scenarios. Each section contains enough content to require scrolling. Playwright agents can detect this section by its stable data-testid attribute and verify scroll position. Use pw snapshot or pw screenshot to confirm the viewport position before and after scroll actions. Short section variant to add layout variation.

This is a test section for pwcli scroll automation scenarios. Each section contains enough content to require scrolling.
